# - FastAPI & Uvicorn (Web Framework)
# - LangChain & LangGraph (Agentic Workflow)
# - Qdrant-Client (Vector Database)
# - Portkey-AI (LLM Gateway)
# - Logfire & LangSmith (Observability)
# - NeMo Guardrails (AI Security)
